releases.description:

* fix: track rename events in timekeep registry by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/83
* feat: status bar option to include the folder path by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/82

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Group Settings in Settings Tab and More flexibility for current/total time visualization by @4Source in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/69
* Refactor pdf make renderer by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/72
* refactor: remove react by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/73
* feat: tracking register by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/74
* feat: status bar items by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/75
* feat: autocomplete and registry improvements by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/76
* feat: stop timekeep from status bar by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/77
* feat: dedicated timekeep file format by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/78
* increased test coverage
* commands to create timekeep files
* timekeep file added to the folder right click menu
* expanded exposed api surface (.api on the timekeep plugin now contains a majority of the available timekeep functionaility)
* various performance optimizations
* autocomplete for entry names

## New Contributors
* @4Source made their first contribution in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/69

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/compare/1.16.0...2.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Description

Fixes android releases after the recent sorting additions mobile devices did not support crypto.randomUUID which was used to internally keep track of sorted entries.

## Changes

- Replaced crypto.randomUUID with the "uuid" package

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/compare/1.6.1...1.6.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Description 

Bug fix, with the new addition of sorting some internal comparisons used for updating, and deleting existing entries became broken. This fixes that by adding some runtime IDs to entries to make this system work while sorted (Previously was working based on object references but using the new sorting options the object references are changed in the sorting process)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/compare/1.6.0...1.6.1

releases.description:

- Adds API for integration with other plugins

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Settings changes are now reacted to in real-time (You won't have to restart to see your new settings, they will be reflected immediately)
- Additional PDF configuration (You can now change the timestamp formats in pdf exports)
- General code house keeping, reduction in bundle sizing by using obsidians built-in icon rendering (Not that it matters too much)
- Support for entries that aren't started yet, useful for setups like #5 

## What's Changed
* feat: support non started entires by @jacobtread in https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/pull/6


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobtread/obsidian-timekeep/compare/1.2.11...1.3.0

releases.description:
